{"step_by_step_thinking": "Lingual U plate, palatal strap, and palatal plate are all components that can be used in the construction of a maxillary metal partial denture framework. However, a single palatal plate refers to a single piece of material that covers the palate, and it is not typically a framework component but rather a component of the denture itself. Therefore, it is not a major maxillary metal partial denture frame work.", "answer_choice": "D"}
